title: Korak 60

index
challengeFiles.contents:
const { useState } = React; const POSITIONS = [ "GK", "CB", "LB", "RB", "CDM", "CM", "CAM", "LW", "RW", "ST", "CF" ] as const; type Position = typeof POSITIONS[number]; interface PlayerData { name: string; overallRating: number; position: string; club: string; imageUrl: string; pac: number; sho: number; pas: number; dri: number; def: number; phy: number; } export function getPlayerTier(rating: number): string { if (rating >= 92) return "elite"; if (rating >= 85) return "gold"; if (rating >= 75) return "silver"; return "bronze"; } export const PlayerCard = ({ player }: { player: PlayerData }) => { return (
{player.overallRating}
{player.position}
{getPlayerTier(player.overallRating).toUpperCase()}
{player.club}
{player.name}
{player.pac} PAC
{player.sho} SHO
{player.pas} PAS
{player.dri} DRI
{player.def} DEF
{player.phy} PHY
); } const defaultPlayer: PlayerData = { name: "PELE", overallRating: 98, position: "ST", club: "Santos FC", imageUrl: "https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/curriculum/typescript/tsx-workshop/pele.jpg", pac: 97, sho: 98, pas: 83, dri: 99, def: 41, phy: 75, }; export const FootballPlayerCard = () => { const [player, setPlayer] = useState(defaultPlayer); return (

Football Card Builder

Customize your player card

Player Info

setPlayer({ ...player, name: e.target.value }) } />
setPlayer({ ...player, overallRating: Number(e.target.value), }) } />
setPlayer({ ...player, club: e.target.value }) } />
setPlayer({ ...player, imageUrl: e.target.value }) } />

Player Stats

setPlayer({ ...player, pac: Number(e.target.value) }) } />
setPlayer({ ...player, sho: Number(e.target.value) }) } />

Live Preview

Updates as you type

); };

tests.text: PAS input tvoj treba da ima value jednako kao statistika za pas igrača.
PAS input tvoj mora imati handler za onChange koji poziva setPlayer za širenje player i pas, što je postavljeno na Number(e.target.value).

description: Dodajte svojstvo value elementu PAS input i postavite ga na player.pas. Zatim dodajte svojstvo onChange postavljeno na streličastu funkciju koja prima e kao argument i poziva setPlayer šireći player i postavljajući pas na Number(e.target.value).
